title: Bitcoin price falls under $70K as crypto markets liquidate $800M
summary: Bitcoin fell to fresh two-month lows as BTC price weakness accelerated and analysis targeted its 200-day moving average trend line.

title: Robinhood enters Canada after $180 million WonderFi acquisition
summary: Robinhood will enter Canada after its WonderFi acquisition brought local crypto exchanges Bitbuy and Coinsquare under its control.

title: UBS Offers First AT1 Since Swiss Authorities Paused Reforms
summary: UBS Group AG is set to raise Additional Tier 1 capital in US dollars, its first foray into the market since Switzerland paused plans to tighten rules on the riskiest type of bank debt.

title: India’s Fuel Exports Plunge in May as Domestic Needs Prioritized
summary: India’s fuel exports tumbled to the lowest level in nearly four years in May as a push to ensure domestic supplies during the Iran war shock along with refinery maintenance curbed overseas flows.

title: Nvidia Releases Its Best Open AI Model Yet—But Still Lags Behind China
summary: Nvidia's Nemotron 3 Ultra tops every American open-weight AI system by a wide margin—but still trails the Chinese-led frontier.

title: DuckDuckGo Launched Duck AI. Now Their Hit Product is 'No AI'
summary: As Google buries its search results under AI-generated answers, DuckDuckGo believes a growing number of users just want the old internet back.

title: CME’s 24/7 crypto derivatives market sees $50 million in opening weekend trading
summary: CME Group said that its 24/7 crypto futures and options market saw over 7,200 contracts traded over the first weekend.

title: Mt. Gox moves $739 million worth of bitcoin to two addresses: Arkham
summary: Mt. Gox transferred a combined 10,306 BTC to an unmarked address and its hot wallet early Tuesday, according to Arkham.
